title: ChASCII
description: Prints ASCII art of cheese to the console upon startup.
body:
Have you ever despaired at the lack of ASCII cheese in your log files? This mod corrects that grave absence of dairy product, by printing ASCII cheese to your log file upon game start.



### FAQ
- Is this mod necessary?

  Not if you don't need ASCII cheese.
- Is this mod useful?

  Only if you have a good use for ASCII cheese.
- Is this mod a joke?

  Yes.
